coreInterests.title: Coding
coreInterests.description: Deep diving into backend systems, building robust automation scripts, and designing clean, maintainable software architecture.

coreInterests.title: Gaming
coreInterests.description: Exploring immersive game mechanics and compelling narratives. Occasionally dabbling in indie game development and engine tinkering.

coreInterests.title: Making & Tinkering
coreInterests.description: Bringing ideas to life through 3D printing, electronics projects, and hands-on problem-solving. Love the challenge of physical builds.

fusionPassions.title: GameDev Alchemy
fusionPassions.description: (Coding + Gaming) Prototyping unique game ideas, experimenting with game engines, and exploring the technical side of game creation.

fusionPassions.title: Tech Tinkerer
fusionPassions.description: (Coding + Making) Building practical gadgets with microcontrollers (like ESP32/Raspberry Pi), automating home tasks, and bridging software with hardware.

fusionPassions.title: Creative Engineering
fusionPassions.description: (Gaming + Making) Designing and 3D printing game-inspired props, functional replicas, or custom components for tech projects.

homelabDetails.description: My personal homelab serves as a complete ecosystem for development, automation, self-hosting, and smart home orchestration. It runs across a Proxmox cluster, a dedicated TrueNAS server, multiple Raspberry Pi boards, and an OPNsense firewall appliance. This environment powers my daily development workflows, 3D-printing operations, automation pipelines, and shared family services.
specs: **Compute & Virtualization:** Proxmox cluster running on multiple Lenovo M910q nodes
**Storage:** Dedicated custom-built TrueNAS Core server (RAID-5 + standalone media storage)
**Development Node:** Mac Mini M4 used exclusively for coding and local LLM workloads
**Edge & Utility Nodes:** Raspberry Pi 4 Kubernetes cluster
**Networking:** OPNsense firewall appliance with segmented VLANs for homelab, IoT, and services
**Containerization:** Docker VM on Proxmox hosting shared services (Affine, n8n, Audiobookshelf, Plex, etc.)
**Home Automation:** Home Assistant, Zigbee, Metabase dashboards, FinTrack pipelines for expense/income tracking
**3D Printing:** Elegoo Saturn 4 Ultra & Creality Hi with automated monitoring and workflow integrations
